name: Overnight Hashed Brown Potatoe Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut butter into potatoes.
2. Mix the remaining ingredients together; pour over top of potatoes.
3. Toss to combine.
1/4 - 3/4 cup milk can be used instead of half of the sour cream. This will make a moister casserole if desired.
4. Bake in a 13x9" pan at 350°F for 1/2 hour covered and an additional 1/2 hour uncovered.
5. Reduce butter usage as it becomes greasy with both Cheddar Cheese soup and butter. Optionally, add extra shredded cheese on top during the last half hour of baking.
